words.definition_vi: thoát khỏi hình phạt hoặc hậu quả; làm điều gì đó sai trái mà không bị phát hiện hoặc trừng phạt
words.definition_en: to escape punishment or consequences for doing something wrong
words.example_sentence: The company tried to get away with dumping toxic waste into the river, but environmental inspectors discovered the violation.

words.definition_vi: đồng ý với; chấp nhận ý kiến hoặc kế hoạch của người khác
words.definition_en: to agree with or accept someone's idea, plan, or opinion
words.example_sentence: Most team members went along with the proposal to extend the project deadline by two weeks.

words.definition_vi: coi thường; xem ai/cái gì là kém hơn hoặc không đáng kính
words.definition_en: to regard someone or something as inferior or unworthy of respect
words.example_sentence: In many traditional societies, people who look down on manual labor often fail to appreciate skilled craftspeople.

words.definition_vi: hết; không còn cái gì nữa
words.definition_en: to use up the entire supply of something; to have no more of something left
words.example_sentence: The hospital ran out of oxygen supplies during the pandemic, forcing administrators to implement emergency protocols.

words.definition_vi: bắt kịp; theo kịp ai/cái gì; đạt được mức độ tương tự
words.definition_en: to reach the same level or position as someone ahead; to meet someone after pursuing them
words.example_sentence: Developing nations are working hard to catch up with industrialized countries in technological innovation.

words.definition_vi: giống; có những đặc điểm giống như cha mẹ hoặc người thân
words.definition_en: to resemble or have similar characteristics to a parent or relative
words.example_sentence: The young scientist takes after her mother, who was also a renowned researcher in environmental biology.

words.definition_vi: làm nổi bật; phát hành; khiến cái gì trở nên rõ ràng hơn
words.definition_en: to make something more noticeable or prominent; to publish or release a product
words.example_sentence: The documentary brings out the hidden struggles of migrant workers in the agricultural industry.

words.definition_vi: tình cờ gặp; tìm thấy; truyền đạt được ấn tượng nào đó
words.definition_en: to meet or find someone or something by chance; to give a particular impression
words.example_sentence: While researching climate change, scientists came across evidence suggesting the crisis is accelerating faster than previously predicted.

words.definition_vi: dựa vào; sử dụng cái gì như một phương án dự phòng
words.definition_en: to rely on something as a backup plan or resource when other options fail
words.example_sentence: When traditional marketing strategies failed, the startup had to fall back on social media influencers to promote their product.

words.definition_vi: tiếp tục làm; có mối quan hệ tốt với ai; tiến hành
words.definition_en: to continue doing something; to have a good relationship with someone; to proceed with
words.example_sentence: Despite budget constraints, the research team decided to get on with the project and seek alternative funding sources.

words.definition_vi: kính trọng; ngưỡng mộ; coi ai là tấm gương
words.definition_en: to admire and respect someone; to regard someone as a role model
words.example_sentence: Young environmental activists look up to Greta Thunberg for her unwavering commitment to climate action.

words.definition_vi: chịu đựng; chấp nhận cái gì không thoải mái
words.definition_en: to tolerate or accept something unpleasant without complaining
words.example_sentence: Factory workers have had to put up with poor working conditions and inadequate safety measures for decades.

words.definition_vi: hỗ trợ; sao lưu; chứng minh; lùi lại
words.definition_en: to support someone; to make a copy of data; to reverse; to provide evidence for a claim
words.example_sentence: The researcher's findings were backed up by multiple peer-reviewed studies conducted across different countries.

words.definition_vi: chia tay; tan rã; phá vỡ; kết thúc
words.definition_en: to end a romantic relationship; to dissolve or separate; to interrupt
words.example_sentence: The coalition government broke up after disagreements over environmental policy implementation.

words.definition_vi: kiểm tra; xem xét; rời khỏi (khách sạn); trở nên thú vị
words.definition_en: to examine or investigate; to leave a hotel; to become interesting or impressive
words.example_sentence: Investors should check out the company's financial reports before making any major investment decisions.

words.definition_vi: tìm ra; hiểu; giải quyết; tính toán
words.definition_en: to understand or solve something; to calculate; to determine
words.example_sentence: Climate scientists are working to figure out how ocean acidification affects marine ecosystems on a molecular level.

words.definition_vi: chơi; tụ tập; dành thời gian cùng nhau
words.definition_en: to spend time relaxing or socializing with someone; to frequent a place
words.example_sentence: Urban planners recognize that public parks provide essential spaces where communities can hang out and build social connections.

words.definition_vi: nhận thức được; phát hiện; bắt đầu lại; tiếp tục
words.definition_en: to notice or detect something subtle; to resume something; to understand an implication
words.example_sentence: Experienced teachers pick up on subtle signs of student anxiety and adjust their teaching methods accordingly.

questions.question_text: The environmental organization warned that companies should not be allowed to _____ illegal dumping practices just because enforcement is weak.
questions.explanation: Câu hỏi yêu cầu cụm động từ có nghĩa 'thoát khỏi hình phạt'. 'Get away with' là đáp án đúng. 'Go along with' (đồng ý), 'look down on' (coi thường), 'run out of' (hết) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh.

questions.question_text: Which phrase best completes the sentence: 'The board members _____ the CEO's proposal to restructure the company despite initial concerns.'
questions.explanation: 'Go along with' (đồng ý/chấp nhận) là cụm động từ phù hợp. 'Looked down on' (coi thường), 'ran out of' (hết), 'caught up with' (bắt kịp) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh về quyết định của hội đồng.

questions.question_text: The developing nation is determined to _____ industrialized countries in renewable energy technology within the next decade.
questions.explanation: 'Catch up with' (bắt kịp/theo kịp) là đáp án chính xác. 'Take after' (giống), 'bring out' (làm nổi bật), 'fall back on' (dựa vào) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh về công nghệ năng lượng.

questions.question_text: What is the best meaning of 'come across' in this context: 'While reading the research paper, I came across some fascinating data about climate patterns.'
questions.option_b: to meet or find by chance
questions.explanation: 'Come across' trong ngữ cảnh này có nghĩa 'tình cờ tìm thấy/gặp'. Các đáp án khác không phù hợp: 'criticize harshly' (chỉ trích), 'communicate effectively' (giao tiếp hiệu quả), 'travel across' (đi qua) đều sai.

questions.question_text: The startup had to _____ its initial marketing strategy and focus on digital platforms when traditional advertising failed to generate sales.
questions.explanation: 'Fall back on' (dựa vào/sử dụng phương án dự phòng) là đáp án đúng. 'Pick up on' (phát hiện), 'check out' (kiểm tra), 'break up' (chia tay) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh về chiến lược kinh doanh.

questions.question_text: Which phrase is closest in meaning to 'admire and respect someone as a role model'?
questions.explanation: 'Look up to' có nghĩa 'kính trọng/ngưỡng mộ'. 'Look down on' (coi thường), 'look into' (điều tra), 'look out for' (cảnh báo) có nghĩa khác hoàn toàn.

questions.question_text: The research team decided to _____ the project despite budget cuts, believing that the scientific value justified continued effort.
questions.explanation: 'Get on with' (tiếp tục/tiến hành) là đáp án chính xác. 'Back up' (hỗ trợ), 'figure out' (tìm ra), 'hang out' (chơi/tụ tập) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh về tiếp tục dự án.

questions.question_text: The psychologist could _____ subtle signs of depression in the patient's behavior that others had completely missed during initial consultations.
questions.explanation: 'Pick up on' (phát hiện/nhận thức được những dấu hiệu tinh tế) là đáp án đúng. 'Break up' (chia tay), 'hang out' (chơi), 'check out' (kiểm tra) không phù hợp ngữ cảnh về phát hiện các dấu hiệu tâm lý.
